James Smith
Charlotte, NC

Summary
Dedicated and experienced dock worker with over 3 years of hands-on experience in freight handling and logistics. Proven ability to operate forklifts safely and efficiently, with a strong commitment to workplace safety. Adept at loading and unloading shipments, maintaining inventory accuracy, and collaborating effectively with team members to ensure smooth operations.

Experience
Dock Worker  
ABC Logistics, Charlotte, NC  
June 2020 - Present  
- Operate forklifts to move heavy freight, ensuring safety and compliance with all regulations.  
- Load and unload shipping containers, consistently lifting loads of up to 75 lbs.  
- Conduct regular inventory checks and assist in maintaining accurate stock records.  
- Collaborate with dispatch teams to ensure timely shipment deliveries and pickups.

Freight Handler  
XYZ Freight Services, Charlotte, NC  
January 2019 - May 2020  
- Assisted in the loading and unloading of freight, utilizing manual and mechanical equipment.  
- Maintained a clean and organized work environment, ensuring safety standards were met.  
- Worked as part of a team to maximize efficiency during peak shipping periods.

Certifications
- Forklift Operator Certification, National Safety Council, 2021  

Skills
- Forklift operation  
- Freight handling  
- Inventory management  
- Team collaboration  
- Strong physical stamina and ability to lift heavy loads  
- Attention to detail in shipping and receiving processes

Education
High School Diploma  
Charlotte High School, Charlotte, NC  
Graduated: May 2018
